item.text: I found the likely targets: `features/src/lib.rs` for the registry and `ext/repo-intelligence/src/extension.rs` for the contributor. Next I’ll inspect those exact sections and patch them following existing feature patterns.

I confirmed the feature registry is centralized in `features/src/lib.rs`. I’m now checking for every `RepoIntelligenceExtensionConfig` construction so adding a new telemetry field won’t break tests or callsites.
